Waverly Park, 4800 Waverly Park Rd, Louisville, KY 40214, USA
So many little trees everywhere along the trail but very few mature and no fruiting. Give it a few years. Access: Public.
9501 Cane Run Rd, Louisville, KY 40258, USA
Three trees behind the FiveStar gas station, where the truck pumping stations are. Two have poison ivy vines crawling up them. Access: Public.
